translations.***不要像我一樣一開始裝反還不知道，雖然也沒差？：***\n\n: ***Don't be like me, installing it the wrong way at first and not realizing it—though it doesn't really matter?***

translations.一樣樸實無華的紙質包裝\n\n: Simple and plain paper packaging as usual
translations.同 [上篇](../eab0e984043/) ，建議手較小的購買 Apple: Same as the [previous article](../eab0e984043/), it is recommended that those with smaller wrists buy the Apple Watch 40 mm, because the 40 mm Milanese band fits wrist sizes of 130–180 mm; compared to the 44 mm Milanese band, which fits wrist sizes of 150–200 mm, it is 20 mm shorter.
translations.夾毛髮、夾毛髮、夾毛髮、比較重。\n\n: Catches hair, catches hair, catches hair, relatively heavy.
translations.實戴圖正面\n\n: Front view of the watch worn
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有磁貼的那邊在下在外扣入 Apple Watch 本體。\n\n: The side with the magnetic clasp hooks onto the Apple Watch body.
translations.潛伏在 Apple 社團許久，觀察到大家最常問的問題就是米蘭錶帶原廠 vs 副廠: Having lurked in Apple communities for a long time, I've noticed the most common question is about original vs third-party Milanese bands. Personally, I think the difference is minimal, mainly in details and craftsmanship. The original can also catch hair, but its weaving is delicate and seamless. The magnet is strong and won’t loosen, and it’s clean and skin-friendly without any rust smell. However, the price difference is several times (the original costs $3,100). It’s best to feel the actual product before deciding. I guess third-party Milanese bands priced around 1,000 to 2,000 are almost equal in quality to the original.
translations.現在也不叫太空灰了，叫石墨色。\n\n: It's no longer called Space Gray; now it's called Graphite.
translations.目前我的米蘭錶帶已使用近 5 年，無特別磨損、生鏽、拖鏈或異味，相較於我買過的其: I have been using my Milanese loop for nearly 5 years with no significant wear, rust, snagging, or odor. Compared to other bands I've owned, this one is the longest-lasting and most durable.
translations.磁力錶扣，可吸在任意位置，任意調整表環大小\n\n: Magnetic clasp that can attach anywhere, allowing you to adjust the band size freely.
translations.米蘭錶帶由不鏽鋼織網與磁力錶環組成，不鏽鋼織網的好處是透氣、速乾、不會有異味；磁: The Milanese loop is made of stainless steel mesh and a magnetic clasp. The stainless steel mesh is breathable, quick-drying, and odor-free. The magnetic clasp allows the band to be adjusted to any position for a better fit, easy wearing, and strong magnetism to prevent it from falling off. Most importantly, it gives the Apple Watch a more formal look and better matches outfits.
translations.緊接著上篇「 [Apple Watch Series 6 開箱 & 兩年使用心得: Following the previous article "[Apple Watch Series 6 Unboxing & Two Years of Use Experience](../eab0e984043/)," I finally decided to purchase the [official Milanese Loop band](https://www.apple.com/tw/shop/product/MTU22FE/A/40-%E5%85%AC%E9%87%91%E9%8A%80%E8%89%B2%E7%B1%B3%E8%98%AD%E5%BC%8F%E9%8C%B6%E7%92%B0){:target="_blank"}. I had wanted it two years ago but never bought it; this time I updated everything at once. Apple guarantees that the band is compatible with all future Apple Watch models, so I’m not worried about the band becoming unusable after upgrading the watch.
translations.連接端 - 靠近磁力錶扣的那端 — 底部 — 有「Assembled in Ch: Connection end - the end near the magnetic clasp — bottom — has the text "Assembled in China"
translations.連接端另一端 — 表面 — 有「44MM」字樣\n\n: The other end of the connector — the surface — has the "44MM" marking
translations.錶帶是一體成型長度無法調整；如果錶帶已經調到緊繃還是太大那只能考慮副廠，不然就吃: The strap is made in one piece and its length cannot be adjusted; if it's already tightened and still too big, you can only consider third-party bands or just gain some weight (?). So it's safer to try it on at a store first.
translations.類似原廠矽膠錶帶，但差別在沒有多附短版的錶帶ＸＤ\n\n: Similar to the original silicone strap, but the difference is that it doesn't come with an extra short strap XD
